title: Reggae Night + Rooftop Drinks
description: Start with live reggae at a rooftop bar in Atlanta. Nothing beats good music and skyline views together.

title: EYEDRUM Gallery + Coffee Walk
description: Browse the gallery's latest experimental exhibits, then walk through Castleberry Hill with coffee in hand. Great for deep conversations.

title: Ponce City Market Evening
description: Hit the market for diverse food hall options — vegetarian-friendly. Walk the BeltLine after with gelato from Morelli's.

title: Dad's Garage Improv Comedy
description: Hilarious, interactive improv. You might end up on stage as a suggestion — embrace the chaos together.

title: Atlanta Botanical Garden at Dusk
description: Walk the gardens as the sun goes down. The Cascades Garden is especially beautiful in evening light. Quiet, scenic, romantic.
